effects.effect: Each lightbender acting this turn can teleport up to their speed as a move action and attempt to hide as a free maneuver, all until the start of their next turn.

Each lightbender acting this turn can create a duplicate lightbender in an unoccupied space adjacent to them. The duplicate is indistinguishable from the lightbender except by supernatural means, has 1 Stamina, and has the lightbender's speed. A duplicate acts on the lightbender's turn but can take only move actions. Once per round before or after using an ability, a lightbender can trade places with any lightbender duplicate.

effects.tier1: The target doesn't have line of effect to any lightbender (save ends).
effects.tier2: The target doesn't have line of effect to any lightbender (EoT).
effects.effect: Each lightbender in the encounter shines radiantly, distorting the senses of any enemy within 5 squares of them. Each affected enemy makes a **Reason test**.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The pouncer can make a free strike against each target they knock prone.

features.name: Sparkling Tail Whip
features.target: Each enemy and object in the area

effects.tier2: 7 damage; A < 1 the target is dazzled (save ends)
effects.tier3: 10 damage; A < 2 the target is dazzled (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A dazzled target takes a bane on strikes and has line of effect only within 1 square.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: While dazed this way, a target has speed 0. If a target takes damage, or if someone else uses a main action to shake the target out of their stupor, the dazed condition ends.

features.name: Striking Afterimage
features.trigger: The pouncer takes damage from a strike.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The pouncer halves the damage, ignores any nondamaging effects associated with it, and can teleport up to 5 squares. If they teleport into concealment or cover, the pouncer can immediately attempt to hide as a free maneuver.
Any effect on the pouncer that would be ended by a saving throw instead ends automatically at the end of their next turn.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If this ability gains an edge or has a double edge, it deals an extra 4 damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: While bleeding this way, the target takes a bane on tests to search for the lightbender while they are hidden.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: While dazed this way, a target has speed 0. If a target takes damage, or if someone else uses a main action to shake the target out of their stupor, the dazed condition ends.

features.name: Stalker's Afterimage
features.trigger: The lightbender takes damage from a strike.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The lightbender halves the damage, ignores any nondamaging effects associated with it, and can teleport up to 5 squares. If they teleport into concealment or cover, the lightbender can immediately attempt to hide as a free maneuver.
Any effect on the lightbender that would be ended by a saving throw instead ends automatically at the end of their next turn.
